name: Pasta Fagioli
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Basil (a little more won't hurt)
1 tsp Oregano (a little more won't hurt)
2 1/2 tbsp Granulated garlic or 1 - 1 1/2 tbsp. garlic powder
1 Stalk celery cut into 3 pieces - discard later
1 cup Olive oil (Bertoli works very well)
recipeInstructions:
(optional) 2/3 lb smoked picnic ham or 1 smoked ham hock
Cook beans in water for 15 minutes (boil hard until beans sink). Add the rest of the ingredients. Keep rolling boil until beans are done. (Not too soft). If soup is too thick, add a little more water.
Cook 1/2 lb. of small shell macaroni (al dente). Drain well, add to soup when serving. Soup should be 30% macaroni - 70% soup. When serving, add parmesan cheese and pepper to taste.
FREEZES VERY WELL.
